history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A young man in a blue-and-white shirt and a dark cap stands in front of a wall poster and shop display panels, posing with his hand raised near his face while looking at the camera.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a young man with short dark hair visible under a dark cap. He is facing the camera with a slight smile and his left hand raised, fingers near his cheek and jaw area, while his right arm rests across his torso. He wears a blue short-sleeved shirt with white vertical stripes and a round emblem on the chest area, and he also wears dark pants.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors, in what looks like a small shop or counter area. Behind him are multiple stacked display panels and posters, with bright indoor lighting that makes his face and shirt clearly visible.

Visual Details:
The background includes a large printed poster on a wall, with a mix of green and red text blocks on the right side and a diagram-like graphic on the left side, including grid-like boxes. Behind the man, there is a row of product display labels or screens with repeating “NEXT” text in red and yellow blocks across the top. A blue metal or plastic railing-like structure runs horizontally behind him. On the lower left foreground, part of a red fabric item is visible, and on the lower right, a partially visible box or package sits near the edge of the frame. The camera angle is roughly eye-level, framed tightly around the man from about the chest upward, with his raised hand prominent in the center.

Visible Text:
NEXT
NEXT
NEXT
HARGA 25 JUTA
UK-10X20
No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a young man posing at a counter or display area indoors, looking toward the camera with his hand raised near his face. Behind him are posters and repeating “NEXT” text signage, including a section with “HARGA 25 JUTA” and “UK-10X20.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

- UK-10x20  
- HARGA 25 JUTA  
- Bebas Banjar  
- Tanah akan bergaransi  
- Tanah Keras  
- Dekat dengan permukiman warga  
- Dekat dg sekolah SD, SMP, SIKKA  
- Dekat dengan [unclear]

- Rp. 16.000 [unclear]  
- Rp. 6.000 [unclear]  
- 12 [appears multiple times]  
- 6.000 [appears multiple times]  
- 12 [appears multiple times]  
- NEXT  
- NEXT  

# Structured Version

## Banner / Offer Text (right side)
- Dekat dengan [unclear]  
- Dekat dg sekolah SD, SMP, SIKKA  
- Tanah Keras  
- Dekat dengan permukiman warga  
- Tanah aman bergaransi  
- Bebas Banjar

## Posters / Signs (bottom, partially visible)

- NEXT  
- 12  
- Rp. 16.000 [unclear]  
- Rp. 6.000 [unclear]  
- 6.000 [unclear]  

# Notes
- Several items are partially obscured/blurry, especially the top-right line “Dekat dengan …” and the prices near “Rp. 16.000” / “Rp. 6.000”. These are marked as `[unclear]` where exact wording/amounts can’t be confirmed.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Indonesian man with dark hair and a black baseball cap worn backward is posing for a photo. He is wearing a blue and white striped t-shirt with orange accents and a circular logo on the left chest. He has a playful expression, sticking his tongue out slightly and holding up two fingers near his face. The background features a large, somewhat weathered poster with a blueprint or map on the left side and red text on the right, listing features like "Dekat dengan pusat perbelanjaan" (Close to shopping centers), "Dekat dg sekolah SD, SMP, SMKN" (Close to elementary, junior high, vocational schools), "Tanah Keras" (Hard ground), "Dekat dengan permukiman warga" (Close to residential areas), "Tanah aman bergaransi" (Guaranteed safe land), and "Bebas Banjir" (Flood-free). Below this text, there's a price listed as "HARGA 25 JUTA UK 10x20" (Price 25 million, size 10x20). Several "NEXT" brand products, possibly cigarettes or snacks, with prices like "Rp. 16.000,-" and "Rp. 10.000,-" are visible along the bottom of the poster. The lighting is somewhat dim and warm, suggesting an indoor or evening setting. The overall mood is casual and youthful.
